description: A quote card with a solid medium-blue background. At the top center is a circular cropped headshot of a middle-aged man in a dark suit with a red-and-white striped tie, standing in front of an American flag and a blue flag. Below, set between large light-blue decorative quotation marks, white serif text reads: 'ICE alone has arrested over 65,000 illegal aliens - including 2,288 gang members from Tren de Aragua, MS-13, 18th Street and other gangs.' The attribution beneath reads '- TODD LYONS' with 'ICE Acting Director' in italics. The bottom right shows the DHS seal and the large white 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: ICE alone has arrested over 65,000 illegal aliens - including 2,288 gang members from Tren de Aragua, MS-13, 18th Street and other gangs. - TODD LYONS, ICE Acting Director
